## IIUSA Data Report: USCIS Processing Times for I-526, I-829 Petitions and I-924 Applications through May 2016
IIUSA Data Report: USCIS Processing Times for I-526, I-829 Petitions and I-924 Applications through May 2016  Last week United States Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS) published updated processing times for the Immigration Investor Program Office (IPO). The processing times are as follows: I-526 The average processing time for Form I-526 is currently 16.6 months, which […]

## La Consideración de Acción Diferida para los Llegados en la Infancia o DACA Sobrevive la Decisión Reciente del Tribunal Supremo de Los Estados Unidos
En junio 23 del 2016, el Tribunal Supremo de los Estados Unidos emitió un fallo dividido de 4-4 en el caso de United States v. Texas, que mantiene congelado el programa de expansión de DACA. A pesar de esta decisión, la Consideración de Acción Diferida para los Llegados en la Infancia o DACA sigue en […]

## What are the family based visa categories?
For family based petitions, each category is based on the type of relationship the U.S. citizen or green card holder petitioner has with the beneficiary.   Parents, spouses and children under 21 of U.S. citizens always have a visa number available so they will not have to wait.   Everyone else must fit into one […]
